name: Memory
description: Store and recall values across workflow iterations.
doc:
Persist values across workflow runs using a key-value store.

Operations:
• Get - retrieve stored value
• Set - store new value
• Append - add to array (creates if doesn't exist)
• Clear - delete stored value

Use Cases:
• Track conversation history
• Accumulate results across runs
• Store configuration between sessions

Storage:
Values are persisted in the shared agent memory database and survive app restarts.
